track_label: Synthesis (keep winning architecture, selectively incorporate proven helpers)

accepted_helper_from_rejected_track.helper: non-string input guard: parse() raises TypeError('text must be str')
accepted_helper_from_rejected_track.evidence: track-line-regex/final/parser.py lines 161-162 and its committed test test_type_error_for_non_string
accepted_helper_from_rejected_track.why_compatible: Boundary precondition at the public API, not a parsing mechanism; leaves the state machine untouched and improves misuse diagnostics.

rejected_helpers_from_rejected_track: regex/offset pipeline (_physical_lines, _logical_records, _FIELD, source_offsets) -- duplicates scanner/state responsibilities (independent judge finding)
re-basing ParseError onto ValueError -- no objective test requires it; winner's Exception base + structured attributes is a deliberate, stable contract
union_testing_finding: No functional bug. Surfaced an under-specified edge: Unicode-whitespace-only lines are data in the winner (ASCII-only structural whitespace) vs. ignorable in the rejected Track. Deliberate, self-consistent, consistent with the shared suite's unicode_not_padding case; affects no hard gate.
